title: lathyrus debilis var. campestris
intro: Lathyrus debilis var. campestris, commonly known as the annual vetchling, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. The annual vetchling is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it a potential treatment for various health issues. The plant is rich in nutrients, including vitamins, minerals, and flavonoids, which offer various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. The herbal preparations of Lathyrus debilis var. campestris include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
